name: Olive

conquest.name: Rain of Arrows
conquest.description: Olive launches a hail of arrows, dealing AOE damage around the target.

conquest.name: Target Lock
conquest.description: Olive paints a bullseye on a target, raising damage inflicted on it.

expedition.name: Green Thumb
expedition.description: Olive's unmatched baking skills increase the Town's Mill Output.

expedition.name: Forager's Luck
expedition.description: Olive's logistics expertise increases Bread Gathering Speed in the Wilderness.

exclusive_gear_note: Rare heroes do not have exclusive gear.

shard_cost_to_star_up.note: Rare heroes have significantly lower shard requirements than Legendary/Mythic

lore_background.title: The Forager's Luck
lore_background.derived_character_themes: Archer baker and resource forager. Skill flavor text references "unmatched baking skills", "Green Thumb", and "logistics expertise" — suggesting a practical homesteader-archer identity.

deep_analysis: Olive is a Rare archer gathering hero — the bread-focused specialist. Her Expedition boosts Town Mill Output and Wilderness Bread Gathering Speed by up to +25% each. Conquest kit features Rain of Arrows (AOE, up to Attack × 252%) and Target Lock (+30% damage to marked targets). Essential for farm accounts maintaining food economy.

effect_op_codes.description: Rare-tier gathering hero — no rally joiner effect_op code (not a combat hero)
effect_op_codes.source: kingshothandbook.com (rare tier heroes not in effect_op stacking system)

named_pairs.note: Olive specializes bread, Diana provides stamina reduction

best_partners.source: kingshothandbook.com effect_op stacking math + community lineup guides

order: Max Green Thumb FIRST (Expedition — +25% Mill Output)
Then Forager's Luck (+25% Bread Gathering Speed)
Conquest is filler — Olive is a gatherer

gear_recommendations.reasoning: Standard archer archetype at rare tier. Derived from community gear build templates (allclash.com Zoe guide as canonical base for infantry, confirmed by community consensus across allclash, heaven-guardian, kingshothandbook build guides).
sources: allclash.com Zoe build guide (canonical infantry template)

counters.reason: No public source documents explicit hero-vs-hero counter matchups for Kingshot. Community discussions reference troop-type rock-paper-scissors (Infantry > Cavalry > Archer > Infantry) and formation-based counters but not specific hero counters. Check Discord/Reddit for player-tested matchups.
